overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city park at night, featuring dense trees, atmospheric fog, teal neon lighting, and homeless encampments. The player moves through a shrine area, under highway overpasses, and across a wooden bridge into a commercial plaza with holographic advertisements. High-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with wet reflective surfaces and dystopian aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense urban park at night, with tall trees forming a canopy overhead. Teal neon light poles provide the primary illumination, casting an eerie glow on wet ground. Homeless encampments with tents are visible to the left, where NPCs sit around small fires. The camera moves forward along a dirt path scattered with debris.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a plaza featuring a traditional stone shrine at its center. A large pink neon billboard reading WET DREAM dominates the left side of the frame, contrasting with the traditional architecture. The camera approaches the shrine while metal railings guide the path. The environment transitions from natural tree cover to a more urban paved area under a highway overpass.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow, enclosed walkway beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The space is darker and more confined, with metal railings running along the right side and graffiti-covered concrete walls on both sides. Teal neon lights continue to line the path, reflecting off the wet pavement. The area is devoid of people, creating a sense of isolation.

emerging into brighter commercial district with multiple holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins as the camera steps onto a wooden pedestrian bridge, leaving the confined overpass area. An NPC in a white tank top walks ahead toward a brightly lit commercial plaza. The environment opens up to reveal tall buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signs, including a prominent red CRESCENT sign. The bridge crosses over dark water, with metal railings on both sides, leading into a spacious urban plaza with palm trees and modern architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, neon-lit urban park into a sprawling, high-tech commercial plaza. It begins on a debris-strewn dirt path beneath a canopy of tall trees, where teal neon poles cast an eerie glow over wet ground and homeless encampments. As the camera moves forward, the natural cover gives way to a paved plaza featuring a traditional stone shrine juxtaposed against a massive pink neon billboard. The scene then shifts into a confined, graffiti-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, where the atmosphere becomes darker and more isolated. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure onto a wooden pedestrian bridge crossing dark water, opening up into a bright urban center filled with holographic advertisements, palm trees, and towering modern architecture.
